title: arenaria biflora var. obtusa
intro: Arenaria biflora var. obtusa, also known as dwarf sandwort, is a type of flowering plant in the pink family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to the mountains of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its use as a diuretic and to treat urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of dwarf sandwort include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Arenaria biflora var. obtusa can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including kidney stones and urinary tract infections.
